requirement_topic.en: EMC and radio control for wireless-enabled products
requirement_topic.zh: 含无线功能产品的 EMC 与电信监管
requirement_topic.zht: 含無線功能產品的 EMC 與電信監管

summary.en: When lithium batteries and power banks have wireless functions, Philippine destination compliance usually requires NTC approvals for the related radio scope before market placement. This is a separate path from general safety testing.
summary.zh: 锂电池和移动电源含无线功能时，菲律宾通常要求在投放市场前完成相关无线范围的 NTC 审核，这是与一般安全测试分开的路径。
summary.zht: 鋰電池和行動電源含無線功能時，菲律賓通常要求在投放市場前完成相關無線範圍的 NTC 核准，這與一般安全測試是分開的路徑。

standards_or_laws: NTC Type Approved and Type Accepted framework
NTC radio and telecommunication device classification rules

summary.en: China uses domestic EMC and telecom compliance routes for applicable modules. These are technical support references and are not destination substitutes for the Philippine NTC process.
summary.zh: 中国对相关模块按国内 EMC 与通信审批路径处理。该路径属于技术支持参考，不替代菲律宾 NTC 目的地流程。
summary.zht: 中國對相關模組按國內 EMC 與通信審批路徑處理。該路徑屬於技術支持參考，不替代菲律賓 NTC 目的地流程。

standards_or_laws: No automatic equivalence for Philippine NTC destination approvals

gap.en: Chinese CE or EMC files are useful for engineering, but they cannot close Philippine wireless destination obligations. Model-level confirmation and NTC route completion are usually required.
gap.zh: 中国的 CE 或 EMC 文件有工程参考价值，但不能替代菲律宾无线目的地义务。通常还需要型号级确认和 NTC 路线完成。
gap.zht: 中國的 CE 或 EMC 文件有工程參考價值，但不能替代菲律賓無線目的地義務。通常還需型號級確認和 NTC 路徑完成。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory when the model includes wireless functions and is placed through Philippine channels requiring NTC scope approval.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where Chinese domestic telecom or EMC approvals are required, but not equivalent for Philippine destination approval.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Handle wireless-enabled lithium products as a separate destination branch in the Philippines. Chinese approvals support engineering; Philippine NTC completion remains required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于含无线功能的锂电产品，菲律宾应作为单独目的地分支处理。中国批准有助于工程判断，但菲律宾 NTC 仍需完成。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對含無線功能的鋰電產品，菲律賓應作為單獨目的地分支處理。中國批准有助於工程判斷，但菲律賓 NTC 仍需完成。
